title: AgentForge Merge Guard
problem: High-risk and agent-assisted pull requests need change control that is deterministic and auditable, not dependent on manual review alone.
impact: Built a GitHub-first PR governance service with policy-as-code rules, deterministic detectors, required evidence, reviewer routing, check runs, and durable Change Control Records — deterministic checks decide, AI explains, humans approve risk.

title: Agentic Control Plane
problem: Autonomous and human-in-the-loop work needs a governed control plane for goals, commitments, approvals, and long-running automations.
impact: Built a TypeScript control plane (Next.js dashboard/API plus a worker process) around a bounded execution loop with risk classification, durable worker jobs, and Postgres-backed state.

title: Apple Calendar MCP Server
problem: AI assistants and command-line workflows lacked a safe, local way to read and manage Apple Calendar on macOS.
impact: Built a Swift/EventKit tool exposing calendar list, search, create, update, and delete over the MCP protocol and a CLI with JSON and table output.

title: Human Operating Model
problem: Autonomous agents struggle with ambiguous, real-world tasks that require judgment, prioritization, and end-to-end ownership.
impact: Authored a Codex skill providing a human-inspired operating model for autonomous task ownership, on-the-fly skill creation, validation, and transparent communication that it is an AI system.

title: myIPSW
problem: Finding official Apple firmware (IPSW/OTA) downloads across devices was fragmented and manual.
impact: Built a site on the ipsw.me API surfacing iOS, iPadOS, tvOS, and watchOS firmware downloads with a custom design.

title: PriceHikeSG
problem: Upcoming price increases across Singapore were hard to track in one place.
impact: Built a lightweight web app that aggregates and publishes updates on upcoming Singapore price hikes.

title: This Portfolio — Governed Static Delivery
problem: A personal site is the easiest place to cut corners: hand-edited HTML, unvetted scripts, no tests. I wanted the opposite — a portfolio that demonstrates the same secure-delivery and AI-governance practices I apply to client work, on a codebase anyone can inspect.
impact: Built a static site generated from validated JSON by a single Node build and guarded by a fourteen-step release gate spanning security, content-parity, performance, telemetry, link-health, dependency, vendor, and accessibility checks. Inline scripts are CSP-hashed, vendored libraries are manifest- and hash-pinned, and an AI assistant can draft changes but only a human-approved plan can execute — deterministic checks decide, humans own the risk.
